title: Agent Enderun Army Schema
description: Strongly-typed schema for all specialist agents in the Enderun Army. Every agent.json must validate against this. v1.0: Removed enum lock on agent names to allow new specialist agents.

name.description: Agent identifier. Must start with @ followed by lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens. e.g. @manager, @backend, @security

capability.description: Numeric capability score (0-10). Used by @orchestrator to assign tasks optimally.

role.description: Short human-readable role title. e.g. 'Orchestration & Governance (Team-Lead)'

specialization.description: Detailed description of the agent's area of expertise.

rules.description: Mandatory behavioral rules the agent must never violate.

permittedDirectories.description: Directories this agent is authorized to read/write. Any access outside these requires @manager approval.

hermesChannels.description: Authorized inter-agent communication channels for this agent.

promptFile.description: Relative path to the detailed prompt/instructions file inside the agent folder. Default: 'prompt.md'

checklists.description: Named checklists the agent must execute. e.g. 'beforeEveryResponse', 'beforeDelegating'

stateMachine.description: Reference to the lifecycle schema. See agents/schema/agent-lifecycle-schema.json

tags.description: Classification tags for filtering and grouping agents.
